forecast.name: Today
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 2pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 2pm and 5pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 79, with temperatures falling to around 77 in the afternoon. Northeast wind 2 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 9pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 61, with temperatures rising to around 63 overnight. Northeast wind 5 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
